example_tasks: Consult with stakeholders on project requirements
Interview candidates for the engineering role
Discuss project roadmap with the product manager
Coordinate with the design team on UI changes
Mentor junior developers on coding standards
Negotiate contract terms with the vendor

poor_matches: Write unit tests for authentication module
reasoning: The icon depicts a person with arrows suggesting a shift in perspective, rotation, or interaction. It is highly effective for tasks involving social interaction, feedback, or changing viewpoints.
